news.headline: BlytzPay honored at Automotive Intelligence Awards for innovative contributions to the automotive sector. #leadingplatform.
news.summary: BlytzPay, a prominent collections management platform, has been honored at the inaugural Automotive Intelligence Awards for its groundbreaking work in the automotive sector. The company's platform, known for improving payment processing and customer engagement, secured recognition for its innovative contributions.

news.headline: Heather Croner Real Estate Sotheby's International Realty merges with William Pitt Sotheby's International Realty in Millbrook, NY. (# of clients)
news.summary: Two leading real estate companies have joined forces to cater to clients in the Hudson Valley area, with their headquarters in Millbrook, New York. The collaboration between Heather Croner Real Estate and Sotheby's International Realty aims to provide top-notch services to buyers and sellers. The announcement was made on March 20, 2025, through a press release on PRNewswire-PRWeb. This partnership is set to offer a luxurious real estate experience, combining the expertise of both firms to better serve their clientele.

news.headline: Juniper Communities partners with NHI on Paramus, NJ senior living community in strategic real estate investment move.
news.summary: Juniper Communities, a prominent provider of senior living facilities, has established a strategic collaboration with National Health Investors, Inc., a top real estate investment trust traded on the NYSE under the symbol NHI. National Health Investors focuses on various real estate investment strategies such as sale-leaseback, joint-venture, mortgage, and mezzanine financing.

news.headline: Face Addiction Now introduces new Michigan Substance Use and Recovery Data Dashboard to track trends. Clinton Township, March 20, 2025.
news.summary: A new interactive "Michigan Substance Use and Recovery Data Dashboard" is being introduced by Face Addiction Now (FAN). This powerful tool aims to offer crucial insights into substance use and mental health trends in Michigan. The initiative, based in Clinton Township, Michigan, was launched on March 20, 2025. This dashboard provides comprehensive data analysis for monitoring trends and patterns related to substance use and mental health across the state.

news.headline: Content Catalyst's Analyst Firm Survey 2025: Analyst firms use AI to navigate economic challenges. Released in CAMBRIDGE, UK on March 20, 2025.
news.summary: Today, Content Catalyst unveiled results from its Analyst Firm Survey 2025, shedding light on how research firms are managing economic challenges and utilizing AI to improve their offerings. The report was disclosed in Cambridge, United Kingdom on March 20, 2025. Significant details from the survey include valuable insights into the strategies adopted by these firms in response to the uncertain economic climate. This data provides a comprehensive understanding of the industry's approach towards AI integration for service enhancement.

news.headline: "Tasting Italy with Roberto Serrini" wins two Taste Awards - Best New Food and Travel Series & RB Cellars Award. Los Angeles, March 20, 2025 - PRNewswire.
news.summary: Renowned food and travel show Tasting Italy with Roberto Serrini recently won two esteemed Taste Awards. The series clinched the titles of Best New Food and Travel Series as well as the premier RB Cellars Award for Best Branded Content. The awards were received this month in Los Angeles. The show has garnered significant recognition for its exceptional content, making it a standout in the industry.

news.headline: Franchise FastLane partners with Sourdough & Co. for franchise expansion; #1 franchise sales org in U.S. OMAHA, Neb., March 20, 2025.
news.summary: A leading franchise sales organization in the United States has collaborated with a sandwich, soup, and salad concept for its initial fast-casual food service partnership. Franchise FastLane, known as the top franchise acceleration and development company in the country, recently made this move. The partnership was announced in Omaha, Nebraska, on March 20, 2025, as Sourdough became the chosen food concept.

news.headline: Only 1% of frontline workers report never facing customer incivility; 72% struggle with difficult behavior.
news.summary: A recent survey conducted by Axonify revealed significant training gaps, with 72% of frontline workers facing challenges in handling a growing number of difficult customer interactions. The study, based in Waterloo, ON and dated March 20, 2025, indicates that as the prices of essential products surge, frontline staff are struggling to effectively address challenging customer behaviors.

news.headline: Miami MSA ranked #2 top housing market in US for 2025, with median prices of $1 million+ homes and existing condos rising year-over-year in February.
news.summary: The median prices for single-family homes and existing condos priced at $1 million and above in Miami-Dade County showed a year-over-year increase in February 2025. This data comes from the MIAMI Association of Realtors (MIAMI). The Miami Metropolitan Statistical Area (MSA) was recently ranked as the second top housing market in the United States.

news.headline: Krisp launched SDK to enhance AI voice agents, improving speech recognition and turn-taking. (Characters: 95)
news.summary: Krisp, a leading voice AI technology company based in Berkeley, California, revealed their latest software development kit (SDK) on March 20, 2025. This new SDK aims to enhance speech recognition accuracy by eliminating background noise and focusing on individual voices. By improving turn-taking and interrupt-handling, the AI voice agents can now respond more efficiently. This innovation is a significant step towards advancing communication technology.

news.headline: Commercial Credit Group Inc. closes its 19th term ABS worth $477,170,000, their largest asset-backed transaction to date.
news.summary: A commercial equipment finance company based in Charlotte has recently finalized its largest asset-backed transaction to date, contributing to its ongoing expansion. Commercial Credit Group Inc. (CCG), headquartered in Charlotte, North Carolina, achieved this milestone on March 20, 2025. This development marks a significant step forward for CCG, a prominent player in the independent commercial equipment finance sector.

news.headline: Cloud Latitude launches Private Equity Portfolio Enhancement Program to optimize IT and drive cost efficiency.
news.summary: Cloud Latitude has launched a new initiative, the Private Equity Portfolio Enhancement Program, aiming to assist private equity firms in enhancing IT, cloud adoption, and operational performance. The program is strategically structured to boost cost efficiency and bolster portfolio valuation. The announcement was made in Vero Beach, Florida on March 20, 2025.

news.headline: Infraday California 2025 in Los Angeles will bring together top infrastructure leaders to address challenges like advanced mobility and sustainable water management.
news.summary: In 2025, Infraday California presents an opportunity for collaboration between public and private sectors to address major infrastructure issues in the state. This event will focus on key areas such as advanced mobility solutions and sustainable water management. With a diverse range of leaders in attendance, Infraday California is set to be a critical event in shaping the future of infrastructure in the state. It will bring together individuals and organizations to strategize and innovate towards overcoming challenges, with significant emphasis on creating a sustainable and efficient infrastructure system.

news.headline: New Uponor ProPEX LF Brass Schedule 80 CPVC Adapters for commercial hybrid piping systems; announced in Orlando, FL on March 20, 2025 by GF Building Flow Solutions Americas. (Character count: 167)
news.summary: GF Building Flow Solutions Americas, formerly Uponor North America, recently introduced the Uponor ProPEX® LF Brass Schedule 80 CPVC Adapters at the city of Orlando on March 20, 2025. This solution offers an efficient option for commercial hybrid piping systems. The company is a leading global provider of Uponor-branded products.

news.headline: New Uponor ProPEX® LF Brass Transition Ball Valves offer design advantages in commercial piping projects. From Orlando, GF Building Flow introduces the product.
news.summary: GF Building Flow Solutions Americas, formerly Uponor North America, announced the launch of the new Uponor ProPEX® LF Brass Transition Ball Valves in Orlando, Florida on March 20, 2025. The valves offer significant design and installation benefits for commercial piping projects. With a focus on quality and efficiency, these valves aim to streamline processes in piping systems. This release reflects the company's commitment to innovation and customer satisfaction.

news.headline: PBS SoCal's Earth Month in 2025 will feature documentaries like SOCAL SNOWY OWL, WILDLIFE ON THE EDGE, THE FUTURE OF NATURE, and PATAGONIA: LIFE ON THE EDGE OF THE WORLD with local wildlife, premiering worldwide and in local events, narrated by actors such as Beau Bridges, Uma Thurman, and Pedro Pascal.
news.summary: In celebration of Earth Month, various exciting events are taking place. One of the highlights is the presentation of "Wildlife on the Edge," showcasing the famous mountain lion P-22 and other diverse wildlife in the Los Angeles mountains. The narration for this experience will be provided by Beau Bridges. Another special feature is "The Future of Nature," narrated by Uma Thurman, which sheds light on the upcoming prospects for nature conservation. Additionally, "Patagonia: Life on the Edge of the World" will be presented, with the narration done by Pedro Pascal. These events aim to raise awareness about environmental issues and the beauty of diverse wildlife.

Possible funding cuts for education programs due to Trump's Education Dept. shutdown.
PDN: Unseasonal rains impact Langer Heinrich Mine
Paladin : Langer Heinrich operations temporarily suspended

K-Bro Linen Inc. achieved record Q4 and full-year results in 2024, with revenue up by 16.4% to $373.6 million. Adjusted EBITDA increased to $72.1 million, and net earnings rose to $18.7 million. The company declared dividends of $1.20 per common share and entered into a $175 million revolving credit facility. Acquisitions, including Villeray and Shortridge, contributed to the growth. Management is positive about future growth prospects.
news.summary: K-Bro Linen Inc. reported its 2024 financial and operating results, including a revenue increase of 16.4% to $373.6 million. Adjusted EBITDA rose to $72.1 million, and adjusted net earnings reached $21.7 million. The company declared dividends of $1.20 per common share and saw long-term debt rise to $123.8 million due to acquisitions. K-Bro secured a three-year $175 million credit facility. CEO Linda McCurdy praised the results and highlighted growth prospects. The company made acquisitions in Canada and the UK, contributing to revenue and earnings. Planned capital spending for 2025 is $10-12 million. The corporation did not find any impairments in its annual tests. In Q4 2024, revenue totaled $95.4 million, with EBITDA at $18 million. Adjusted net earnings were $3.64 million, and dividends declared were $0.30 per diluted share. Total assets stood at $438.15 million. Economic conditions and global events continue to pose risks to the business.

news.headline: Halliburton to discuss Q1 2025 financial results on April 22, 2025 at 8:00 a.m. CT. Press release to be posted on website.
news.summary: Halliburton Company (NYSE: HAL) is set to hold a conference call on April 22, 2025, to review its financial performance for the first quarter of the year. The call is scheduled to commence at 8:00 a.m. CT (9:00 a.m. ET), with a press release containing the Q1 earnings details to be released before the call. Interested individuals can access the press release on the Halliburton website at www.halliburton.com. For those wishing to participate, the call can be listened to through a live webcast available on the company's website.

news.headline: Former Kraken exec praises crypto industry's $119M campaign donations in 2024 US election, saying it's democracy at work. Voting power swung election in favor of Republican Party, not conflicts of interest..crypto donations made a huge impact.
news.summary: In an exclusive interview, former Kraken exchange chief legal officer Marco Santori praised crypto industry firms' political campaign donations during the 2024 US elections, stating it is "democracy at work." He claimed that crypto voters favored Donald Trump and the Republican Party, contributing to their success. Equally, Santori argued that these donations do not present conflicts of interest but rather individuals advocating for their benefits. The crypto industry contributed over $119 million to pro-crypto candidates and policies in the 2024 election, nearly half of all corporate political campaign contributions. This funding played a significant role in the elections' outcomes, with Santori emphasizing that crypto was responsible for 4-5% of the vote, impacting every state across demographics. The industry's lobbying efforts were key in helping the GOP secure both chambers of Congress, the popular vote, and the presidency.

news.headline: Kim Jong Un oversees anti-aircraft missile system test in North Korea
Energy Secretary Chris Wright: Interview
HPS announces Q4 2024 financial outcomes.
news.summary: A recent report reveals that the economy grew by 6.5% in the last quarter, but fell short of the expected 7.1% growth. The job market also saw an increase of 150,000 new jobs, exceeding predictions of 130,000. Inflation remained steady at 2.5%, while consumer spending rose by 3.2%. Despite these positive indicators, the national debt reached a record high of $28 trillion, prompting concerns about future economic stability. The stock market experienced a slight dip, with the main index down by 0.5%, reflecting uncertainty among investors. Experts suggest that government intervention may be needed to address the growing debt and maintain economic growth.

news.headline: US Energy Secretary Chris Wright on Wednesday:
Saltire Capital Ltd. reports $1.8M net operating income in 2024, with $47.3M net loss, $46.0M EBITDA loss, and $2.7M adjusted EBITDA.
news.summary: Saltire Capital Ltd reported its financial results for the year ended December 31, 2024. They completed the acquisition of Strong/MDI Screen Systems, Inc. on September 25, 2024, issuing over 1.9 million common shares and 900,000 series A preferred shares to Strong Global Entertainment Inc. for the acquisition. Additionally, they completed a private placement of 433,559 common shares for approximately $4.3 million. In 2024, Saltire reported a net operating income of $1.8 million, a net loss of $47.3 million (including a $44.6 million listing expense) and an EBITDA loss of $46.0 million. Adjusted EBITDA for 2024 was $2.7 million, a decline from 2023 due to non-recurring expenses related to the acquisition and increased operating expenses as a public company. Saltire's CEO, Andrew Clark, expressed optimism for the company's future initiatives in 2025.

news.headline: Atai, a biotech company, joins others by investing $5 million in Bitcoin for their treasury amid a growing trend.
news.summary: Atai, a biotech company, has recently revealed plans to incorporate a Bitcoin treasury strategy by acquiring $5 million worth of the cryptocurrency. This move aligns Atai with the growing trend among publicly traded firms to invest in Bitcoin as part of their financial strategy.

news.headline: GENFIT completes non-dilutive royalty financing deal with HCRx and buys back 2025 OCEANEs bonds, benefiting liver disease patients.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, GENFIT, a biopharmaceutical company listed on Nasdaq and Euronext under the ticker GNFT, operating in Lille (France), Cambridge (Massachusetts, United States), and Zurich (Switzerland), announced the successful conclusion of its royalty financing deal with HealthCare Royalty (HCRx). The company focuses on enhancing the well-being of individuals battling rare and severe liver ailments. Additionally, GENFIT divulged the outcomes of its buyback proposition to holders of 2025 OCEANEs.

news.headline: Talaria Transportation acquires Eagle Eyes Transportation in Massachusetts, enhancing its cannabis distribution presence in the US.
news.summary: Talaria Transportation, a prominent cannabis logistics provider in the United States, has made significant strides in bolstering its presence as a premier cannabis transportation and wholesale distribution company. A key development has been its entrance into the Massachusetts market. This move, announced on March 20, 2025, signifies the company's strategic expansion efforts. The acquisition agreement reached by Talaria underscores its commitment to solidifying its position as a leader in the industry.

news.headline: Avalon Holdings Corporation reports $17.6M net operating revenues in Q4 2024, compared to $17.7M in previous quarter.
news.summary: In Warren, Ohio, Avalon Holdings Corporation (NYSE Amex: AWX) revealed its financial report for the fourth quarter and fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024. During the fourth quarter of 2024, net operating revenues reached $17.6 million, slightly lower compared to the previous quarter's $17.7 million.

news.headline: Europe working on 5-10 year plan for United States substitution in NATO, Financial Times
European military powers work on plan to substitute US in NATO, Financial Times
Aptar receives top 'A' score on CDP Climate Change Assessment, highlighting strong commitment to sustainability.
news.summary: Aptar, based in Crystal Lake, Illinois, has been awarded an esteemed 'A' score on the CDP Climate Change Assessment. This recognition showcases the company's commitment to environmental sustainability and carbon footprint reduction. With this achievement, Aptar joins a select group of companies leading the way in climate change mitigation efforts.

news.headline: CarMax to report Q4 results on April 10, 2025 before market opens. Conference call at 9:00 a.m. ET with key executives.
news.summary: CarMax, Inc. (NYSE:KMX) based in Richmond, Virginia, will announce its financial results for the fourth quarter ending February 28, 2025, before the market opens on April 10, 2025. A conference call with investors is scheduled for 9:00 a.m. ET on the same day to analyze these results. The call will feature key speakers such as Bill Nash, the President and CEO, Enrique Mayor-Mora, the Executive Vice President and CFO, and Jon Daniels, the Executive Vice President of CAF Operations. To join the live conference call, participants can dial in at the specified time.

news.headline: Lennar reports $520 million net earnings, $1.96 diluted EPS in Q1 2025, with 1% increase in new orders.
news.summary: In the first quarter of 2025, there were notable highlights compared to the same period in the previous year. Net earnings per diluted share stood at $1.96 ($2.14 when excluding mark-to-market losses on technology investments), with total net earnings reaching $520 million. New orders saw a 1% increase to 18,355 homes, while the dollar value of these new orders experienced a 4% decrease amounting to $7 million.

news.headline: Karma Automotive unveils Amaris: first production 2-door coupe, arriving in Q4/2026; promises exclusive, high-performance, efficient ride.
news.summary: Karma Automotive has announced the launch of their inaugural 2-door coupe called Amaris, set to combine exclusivity, high-performance, and efficiency without any compromises. The vehicle is expected to go into production in the fourth quarter of 2026. This announcement was made in Irvine, California on March 20, 2025.

news.headline: Karma Automotive unveils next-gen EREV Amaris 2-Door Coupe at Create Karma 2025 event in Irvine.
news.summary: The latest model of Karma Automotive's Extended-Range Electric Vehicles (EREV) has been revealed as the Amaris 2-Door Coupe in Irvine, California. The unveiling took place during the Create Karma 2025 event on March 20, 2025. This event brought together a diverse group including industry experts, teachers, and community leaders. The new EREV model is expected to make a significant impact in the automotive market with its innovative design and technology.

news.headline: Russel Metals issues $300 million of 4.423% senior unsecured notes with a 5-year maturity to re-establish lower cost debt in capital structure.
news.summary: Russel Metals Inc. (TSX: RUS) has successfully priced a $300 million offering of senior unsecured notes with a 4.423% coupon rate and a five-year maturity term. The Offering aims to re-establish a foundational level of lower-cost term debt within the company's capital structure. This initiative, which took place in Toronto on March 20, 2025, serves as a strategic move by the company to manage its financial obligations effectively.

news.headline: New Concept Energy reports net loss of $19,000 in Q4 2024, a decrease from $39,000 in Q4 2023. Full year 2024 net loss is $18,000.
news.summary: Dallas-based company New Concept Energy, Inc. (NYSE American: GBR), released its financial Results of Operations for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. In the three months ending December 31, 2024, the company saw a net loss of $19,000, a decrease from the $39,000 loss reported for the same period in 2023. For the entire year ending December 31, 2024, a net loss of $18,000 was reported.

news.headline: Echo Global Logistics opens new office in Mexico City to strengthen cross-border services. Chicago-based company expands operations to support supply chain solutions in Mexico.
news.summary: Echo Global Logistics, Inc., a prominent provider of technology-enabled transportation and supply chain management services, has recently inaugurated a new office in Mexico to enhance its cross-border solutions. This strategic move marks an expansion in Echo's footprint and signifies its commitment to bolstering operations in the region. The opening of the Mexico office aligns with Echo's goal of catering to the growing demand for transportation services across borders. The company continues to strengthen its presence globally, with a focus on delivering innovative solutions to its clients. This advancement is poised to contribute significantly to Echo's overall growth trajectory and solidify its position as a key player in the industry.The establishment of the new office in Mexico is a pivotal step for Echo, enabling it to better serve its customers with efficient and seamless cross-border logistics solutions. The timing of this expansion aligns with the increasing need for streamlined transportation services, particularly in the context of growing international trade. By leveraging its technological expertise and industry experience, Echo aims to optimize its operations and provide value-added services to its clientele. The Mexico office is expected to play a crucial role in facilitating smoother cross-border operations and meeting the evolving needs of customers in the region.Echo's decision to expand its presence in Mexico underscores the company's forward-looking approach and its commitment to driving innovation in the transportation and supply chain sector. With the new office serving as a hub for cross-border solutions, Echo is well-positioned to capitalize on the opportunities presented by the dynamic market landscape. By investing in strategic locations and bolstering its capabilities, Echo is poised to enhance its competitiveness and build stronger relationships with customers. The expansion into Mexico reaffirms Echo's dedication to providing best-in-class services and strengthening its foothold in key markets.Overall, the opening of the new office in Mexico represents a significant milestone for Echo Global Logistics, Inc. It symbolizes the company's strategic vision, operational excellence, and customer-centric approach. With a strong focus on innovation and efficiency, Echo is set to elevate its offerings and deliver exceptional value to its customers. As the company continues to expand its footprint and enhance its capabilities, it is poised to achieve sustained growth and solidify its position as a leader in the transportation and supply chain management industry.

news.headline: Bombardier, TCS, TECHNATION Canada announce winners of SustAInable Aviation Student Innovation Challenge in Quebec.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, Bombardier, Tata Consultancy Services (TCS), and TECHNATION Canada revealed the champions of the SustAInable Aviation Student Innovation Challenge in Montréal. This competition focused on encouraging post-secondary students in Quebec, with the aim of influencing the future of business aviation.

news.headline: CAPREIT to renew normal course issuer bid for trust units on TSX. (TSX: CAR.UN) - March 20, 2025.
news.summary: Today, on March 20, 2025, Canadian Apartment Properties Real Estate Investment Trust, known as CAPREIT and listed under the symbol CAR.UN on the Toronto Stock Exchange, revealed that the TSX has approved its plan to renew its normal course issuer bid for its trust units. This bid allows CAPREIT to repurchase a certain amount of its Units, providing an avenue for investment and potentially impacting the market.

news.headline: Patriot National Bancorp to raise over $50 million in private placement, issuing stocks to investors to increase equity.
news.summary: Patriot National Bancorp, Inc. in Stamford, Conn., disclosed on March 20, 2025, that through securities purchase agreements, they are set to raise more than $50 million in a private placement. This involves issuing common stock and non-voting preferred stock to a varied group of accredited investors. The funds garnered from this will primarily serve to boost the equity capital and fortify the financial position of Patriot National Bancorp and its wholly owned banking subsidiary, Patriot Bank NA.

news.headline: Starmer's focus turns to air support for Ukraine as hopes for troops decrease. #Ukraine #support #Starmer

Skyharbour's partner North Shore Uranium signs exploration agreement with English Rivers First Nation for Falcon property. North Shore can acquire 80% by issuing shares worth CAD $1.23M, cash payments of $525k to Skyharbour, and $3.55M in exploration costs.
news.summary: Vancouver, BC, March 20, 2025 - Skyharbour Resources Ltd. announced that its partner, North Shore Uranium, has signed an exploration agreement with the English River First Nation in Saskatchewan. The agreement focuses on collaboration at the Falcon property in the Athabasca Basin. North Shore has the opportunity to acquire an initial 80% interest in Falcon by issuing common shares worth CAD $1,225,000, making cash payments of $525,000 to Skyharbour, and spending $3,550,000 on exploration on the property during the earn-in period.
